headline: Wind River Announces Strategic Collaboration with AMD, Delivering Industry’s First Unified O-RAN and AI-RAN Platform
summary: BARCELONA, Spain, March 02, 2026--Wind River, an Aptiv company and global leader in software for the intelligent edge, is collaborating with AMD to deliver the industry’s first commercially available platform that unifies open radio access network (Open RAN) functions and artificial intelligence-powered radio access network (AI-RAN) workloads on shared hardware. The solution addresses a critical challenge facing operators: Traditional approaches require separate systems for radio access networks
